name: customer_name
description: Name of the customer who placed the order.

name: amount
description: The total amount of the order.

name: status
description: Current status of the order (e.g., COMPLETED, PENDING, SHIPPED).

name: order_date
description: Date when the order was placed.

name: warehouse_id
description: Identifier for the warehouse where the order is processed.

name: batch_date
description: The date the batch of raw data was processed.
